# Material Kit Vendor Directory

This directory contains FinPulse-local vendor assets for the Material Kit adoption baseline.

- `css/material-kit.min.css`: local compatibility baseline used by templates.
- `js/material-kit.min.js`: lightweight initialization layer for Bootstrap-powered Material interactions.
- `fonts/` and `img/`: reserved for future free-edition assets as needed.

The canonical include point is `templates/layout.html`.
